channel.title: Meta on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Archive 03

item.title: Meta's AI All-In: Is $135 Billion a Waste or a Moat?
item.description: Meta ($META) is facing both skepticism and high expectations from the market regarding its massive AI spending. We analyze whether its investments in advertising efficiency, the Llama ecosystem, AI glasses, and data center CAPEX represent a long-term moat or a waste of capital.

item.title: Meta Is Eating the Internet — Should You Invest Now?
item.description: We analyze the investment prospects for Meta ($META), the empire of Facebook and Instagram. Amid the explosive growth of its AI-powered advertising business and the astronomical investment risks of Reality Labs, three characters engage in a fierce debate over Meta’s future value.
